tableRow.maxContractTerm: 5 years (maximum) for contracts for the purchase of personal property or contractual services entered by a county or city board of education; lease-purchase contracts not greater than 10 years. Within the 5-year cap, multi-year/option-year/price-adjustment terms are permissible only if the total term (including options) does not exceed 5 years and the option terms were in the original competitively-bid specifications.
tableRow.rebidRequired: Required. Except for public works (Title 39), all expenditures by a city or county board of education for labor, services, or personal property of $40,000 or more must be made under contract entered through free and open competitive sealed bidding to the lowest responsible bidder (§ 16-13B-1(a)(1)). The § 16-13B-2 exception list has no pupil/school-bus transportation carve-out. At expiration of the 5-year term, a new contract meeting the threshold must be re-let by competitive bidding.
tableRow.renewalMechanics: N/A as a statutory renewal-without-rebid mechanism for student-transportation contracts. The only renewal-without-rebid exception (§ 16-13B-2(a)(9)) is limited to sanitation/solid waste.
